data.description: Brent Crude futures settle at $68.12/bbl, down 50 cents, 0.73%.

data.title: WTW to pay regular quarterly dividend of $0.92 per share, payable on Oct 15, 2025 to shareholders of record by Sept 30.
data.description: On August 29, 2025, a prominent advisory and broking firm, WTW, disclosed a recent decision made by its Board of Directors. They have given the green light for a routine quarterly cash dividend amounting to $0.92 for each common share held for the quarter that concluded on June 30, 2025. Shareholders registered as of the cut-off date on September 30, 2025, will be eligible to receive this dividend, which is projected to be distributed around October 15, 2025.

data.title: Caterpillar expects profit margins to be at the low end, warning of bigger hit from Trump tariffs.
data.description: Caterpillar has announced a downward revision in its profit margins, now expecting them to fall to the lower boundary of its projected range. This news comes as a warning from a prominent leader in the Dow Jones, indicating that there could be a more significant impact from the tariffs imposed by President Trump. This development has sparked concerns among investors and analysts about the potential implications on the company's financial performance.

data.title: 21Shares ETP grants institutional exposure to Hyperliquid token, now available for Europe's investors.
data.description: European institutional investors can now access Hyperliquid's native token through a crypto exchange-traded product (ETP) listed in Europe. This development marks the first opportunity for institutional investors to invest in Hyperliquid's token via this ETP.

data.title: Mexico construction industry projected to grow at 2.50% CAGR from 2025-2034, driven by government initiatives.
data.description: A report titled "Mexico Construction Market Report and Forecast 2025-2034" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting a 2.50% CAGR for the Mexico construction market between 2025 and 2034. The market growth is driven by government initiatives promoting infrastructural development in Mexico. Additionally, there is a notable increase in efforts to deliver specialized care and support to individuals facing terminal illnesses in the country.

data.title: Sparkstone Electrical Group combines 4 industry leaders to redefine power distribution speed; includes Chicago Switchboard, CES Industrial, IER, and Park.
data.description: On August 29, 2025, in Addison, Illinois, Sparkstone Electrical Group (SEG) unveiled its consolidated brand, amalgamating four prominent electrical equipment manufacturers in North America - Chicago Switchboard, CES Industrial, IER, and Park. This initiative aims to combine the strengths and expertise of these industry leaders.

data.title: PitchBook named Best Workplace for 11th year by Puget Sound Business Journal in WA, XL category (250+ employees).
data.description: PitchBook, a leading data provider for private and public equity markets, has been acknowledged as one of Washington’s Best Workplaces by Puget Sound Business Journal. This recognition comes in the Extra Large category, encompassing companies with 250+ employees in Washington. The selection and ranking process is determined by employee satisfaction surveys evaluating aspects such as benefit offerings, leadership, collaboration, growth opportunities, and team dynamics. PitchBook stands out as a winner in this prestigious accolade.

data.title: Dollar General surpasses Q2 earnings at $1.86 per share vs $1.58 est. Analysts raise price targets to $123 and $126.
data.description: Amid economic uncertainty, retailers are adjusting to changing consumer spending habits. These shifts are impacting company performance and stock prices, creating a complex investment landscape. Dollar General Corp's (NYSE: DG) shares dropped despite positive second-quarter results. Analysts like Joseph Feldman from Telsey Advisory Group maintained a Market Perform rating, increasing the price target to $123, while Kash Rangan from Goldman Sachs kept a Neutral rating, raising the target to $126. Dollar General's earnings per share of $1.86 exceeded the estimated $1.58. Find more analyst ratings on the company.

data.title: FTT price tests $0.83 lower Bollinger Band support, RSI at 39.40 hints at oversold conditions, drops 4.24%.
data.description: The price of FTT has experienced a decrease of 4.24%, reaching $0.83 and is currently at a critical support level. Technical indicators are providing mixed signals, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 39.40, indicating that there may be potential oversold conditions in the market.

data.title: Over 90 crypto ETFs await SEC approval, with XRP and Solana leading. SEC flooded with applications post Bitcoin, Ethereum nod.
data.description: Following the approval of Bitcoin and Ethereum products by the SEC, the regulatory body is now inundated with an increasing number of applications for cryptocurrency ETFs. The SEC's decision to give the green light to these products has spiked interest in the market, with a significant uptick seen in the number of applications for crypto-related exchange-traded funds. This signifies a shifting trend towards mainstream acceptance and adoption of digital assets, with regulatory authorities now grappling with the task of evaluating and processing this surge in requests. The surge in applications is indicative of the growing demand and interest in crypto investments, with the SEC now tasked with navigating this evolving landscape to ensure compliance and investor protection.
